login.hint: Hint: Default account {username} / Default password {password}. Please change your password after first login.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: For your account security, please reset your password on first login
changePassword.requirement: Password must be at least 8 characters, containing letters and numbers. Recommended to use a mix of uppercase, lowercase, numbers and special characters.
changePassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
changePassword.sameAsDefault: New password cannot be the same as the default password
changePassword.changeSuccess: Password changed successfully, please sign in again
